description: Style Notesepia adds sophistication to your attire with this minimalistic pink spaghetti. Sepia has a unique style quotient and the soft cotton will keep you in exemplary comfort all day. Wear it with form fitting denims and style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes to live up to the candy floss theme.Product DetailsLolly pop pink sleevless top, has a round neck with intricate brown strappingMaterial and Care100% cottonRinse separateGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printDry on reverse side under sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33') is wearing a size M
